Vertical flux plane area

Source: R/p_collision.R
vertical_flux_plane_area.Rd

The probability of collision given interaction requires the calculation of a vertical flux window through which flights occur. The width is 2x the effective detection radius and the height is the max. height of the turbine

Usage

vertical_flux_plane_area(hh, rotor_diam)

Arguments

hh

hub height (m)

rotor_diam

rotor diameter (m)

Value

area of plane of flight in m^2

Examples


vertical_flux_plane_area(
  hh = 150,
  rotor_diam = 210
)
#> [1] 53550
